division_title: REGISTRATION OF VEHICLES AND CERTIFICATES OF TITLE
chapter_title: Original and Renewal of Registration; Issuance of Certificates of Title
text: “Environmental license plates,” as used in this article, means license plates or permanent trailer identification plates that have displayed upon them the registration number assigned to the passenger vehicle, commercial motor vehicle, motorcycle, trailer, or semitrailer for which a registration number was issued in a combination of letters or numbers, or both, requested by the owner or lessee of the vehicle.
markdown:
# Vehicle Code
## Division 3. REGISTRATION OF VEHICLES AND CERTIFICATES OF TITLE [4000 - 9808]
### Chapter 1. Original and Renewal of Registration; Issuance of Certificates of Title [4000 - 5506]
#### Article 8.5. Environmental License Plates [5100 - 5112]
##### § 5103

“Environmental license plates,” as used in this article, means license plates or permanent trailer identification plates that have displayed upon them the registration number assigned to the passenger vehicle, commercial motor vehicle, motorcycle, trailer, or semitrailer for which a registration number was issued in a combination of letters or numbers, or both, requested by the owner or lessee of the vehicle.

*(Amended by Stats. 2000, Ch. 861, Sec. 29.5. Effective September 29, 2000. Operative December 31, 2001, pursuant to Sec. 67 of Ch. 861.)*

subsections.text: “Environmental license plates,” as used in this article, means license plates or permanent trailer identification plates that have displayed upon them the registration number assigned to the passenger vehicle, commercial motor vehicle, motorcycle, trailer, or semitrailer for which a registration number was issued in a combination of letters or numbers, or both, requested by the owner or lessee of the vehicle.
